title: Tencent Hyra-1.0 Launches Research Intelligent Agent, Unifying AI Development and Scientific Discovery in a Single Framework
excerpt: On July 21, the Tencent Hunyuan team officially released Hyra-1.0 (Hunyuan Research Agent), an intelligent agent capable of recursive self-improvement and speci
content_html:
On July 21, the Tencent Hunyuan team officially released Hyra-1.0 (Hunyuan Research Agent), an intelligent agent capable of recursive self-improvement and specifically designed for performance-oriented research and engineering tasks. The system follows the "The Bitter Lesson" design philosophy—keeping the framework as lightweight as possible and expanding the agent's action space to a large extent, using a simple and general loop framework to convert intelligence and computing power into real returns.

The core architecture of Hyra consists of three parts: the Context Agent maintains an experience library and continuously generates "inspiration" context to fill the task queue; multiple Proposal Agents take context from the queue, generate and run solutions in independent sandboxes; the entire system operates as an asynchronous producer-consumer pipeline, with resource utilization efficiently expanding over time. For tasks without an evaluator, Hyra can be upgraded to a two-layer loop, allowing solutions and evaluation mechanisms to evolve together, effectively preventing reward hacking.

In the AI for AI field, Hyra outperformed the best results reported in Recursive in three benchmark tests: it reduced the validation set BPB to 0.9015 in the NanoChat Autoresearch task; it shortened the time to achieve a validation loss of 3.28 on the deeply optimized NanoGPT Speedrun to 76.4 seconds; and after jointly optimizing 235 GPU kernels on SOL-ExecBench, the Mean SOL reached 0.771.

In the AI for Science field, Hyra selected 55 mathematical open problems from databases such as EinsteinArena, of which 29 set new historical records. The team also provided Hyra with monthly sunspot data from 1749 to 1932, and the recurrence formula discovered by Hyra achieved an R² of 0.77 on out-of-sample data spanning nearly a century. More breakthroughs include Hyra designing a Transformer that can perform 10-digit addition with only 15 trainable parameters, reducing the previous public record by 58.3%; its qubit routing algorithm improved routing efficiency by 44.4% on IBM Q20 compared to the classical SABRE algorithm; and in drug design, the candidate molecules generated by Hyra for the anti-cancer target PARP1 showed significantly higher drug-likeness scores than the marketed drug olaparib.

In the AI for Fun field, Hyra's Go-playing program ranked third among 730 participating programs on the Botzone platform; it can generate renderable 3D models based on a single 2D reference image; and it can also compose full harmonies for various instruments based on a melody, generating richly colored complete arrangements after seven rounds of evolution.

The Tencent Hunyuan team stated that these are still preliminary achievements. In the future, they will integrate Hyra into product systems, real AI R&D pipelines, and industrial scenarios, driving the evolutionary cycle of "scaffolding-data-model," enabling the next generation of Hunyuan models and Hyra to continue co-evolving.

blocks.html_en: On July 21, the Tencent Hunyuan team officially released Hyra-1.0 (Hunyuan Research Agent), an intelligent agent capable of recursive self-improvement and specifically designed for performance-oriented research and engineering tasks. The system follows the "The Bitter Lesson" design philosophy—keeping the framework as lightweight as possible and expanding the agent's action space to a large extent, using a simple and general loop framework to convert intelligence and computing power into real returns.

sentences.en: On July 21, the Tencent Hunyuan team officially released Hyra-1.0 (Hunyuan Research Agent), an intelligent agent capable of recursive self-improvement and specifically designed for performance-oriented research and engineering tasks.
sentences.zh: 7月21日，腾讯混元团队正式发布Hyra-1.0（混元研究Agent），这是一款能够递归自我改进、专为性能导向的研究和工程任务而设计的智能Agent。

sentences.en: The system follows the "The Bitter Lesson" design philosophy—keeping the framework as lightweight as possible and expanding the agent's action space to a large extent, using a simple and general loop framework to convert intelligence and computing power into real returns.
sentences.zh: 该系统遵循“惨痛教训”的设计理念——尽可能保持框架的轻量级，并在很大程度上扩展智能体的行动空间，利用简单通用的循环框架将智能和计算能力转化为真实的回报。

blocks.html_en: The core architecture of Hyra consists of three parts: the Context Agent maintains an experience library and continuously generates "inspiration" context to fill the task queue; multiple Proposal Agents take context from the queue, generate and run solutions in independent sandboxes; the entire system operates as an asynchronous producer-consumer pipeline, with resource utilization efficiently expanding over time. For tasks without an evaluator, Hyra can be upgraded to a two-layer loop, allowing solutions and evaluation mechanisms to evolve together, effectively preventing reward hacking.

sentences.en: The core architecture of Hyra consists of three parts: the Context Agent maintains an experience library and continuously generates "inspiration" context to fill the task queue; multiple Proposal Agents take context from the queue, generate and run solutions in independent sandboxes; the entire system operates as an asynchronous producer-consumer pipeline, with resource utilization efficiently expanding over time.
sentences.zh: Hyra的核心架构由三部分组成：Context Agent维护经验库，不断生成“灵感”上下文来填充任务队列；多个提案代理从队列中获取上下文，在独立的沙箱中生成并运行解决方案；整个系统作为异步生产者-消费者管道运行，资源利用率随着时间的推移而有效扩展。

sentences.en: For tasks without an evaluator, Hyra can be upgraded to a two-layer loop, allowing solutions and evaluation mechanisms to evolve together, effectively preventing reward hacking.
sentences.zh: 对于没有评估者的任务，Hyra 可以升级为两层循环，让解决方案和评估机制一起进化，有效防止奖励黑客攻击。

blocks.html_en: In the AI for AI field, Hyra outperformed the best results reported in Recursive in three benchmark tests: it reduced the validation set BPB to 0.9015 in the NanoChat Autoresearch task; it shortened the time to achieve a validation loss of 3.28 on the deeply optimized NanoGPT Speedrun to 76.4 seconds; and after jointly optimizing 235 GPU kernels on SOL-ExecBench, the Mean SOL reached 0.771.

sentences.en: In the AI for AI field, Hyra outperformed the best results reported in Recursive in three benchmark tests: it reduced the validation set BPB to 0.9015 in the NanoChat Autoresearch task; it shortened the time to achieve a validation loss of 3.28 on the deeply optimized NanoGPT Speedrun to 76.4 seconds; and after jointly optimizing 235 GPU kernels on SOL-ExecBench, the Mean SOL reached 0.771.
sentences.zh: 在 AI for AI 领域，Hyra 在三个基准测试中超越了 Recursive 中报告的最佳结果：它在 NanoChat Autoresearch 任务中将验证集 BPB 降低到了 0.9015；将深度优化的 NanoGPT Speedrun 上实现验证损失 3.28 的时间缩短至 76.4 秒；在 SOL-ExecBench 上联合优化 235 个 GPU 内核后，平均 SOL 达到 0.771。

blocks.html_en: In the AI for Science field, Hyra selected 55 mathematical open problems from databases such as EinsteinArena, of which 29 set new historical records. The team also provided Hyra with monthly sunspot data from 1749 to 1932, and the recurrence formula discovered by Hyra achieved an R² of 0.77 on out-of-sample data spanning nearly a century. More breakthroughs include Hyra designing a Transformer that can perform 10-digit addition with only 15 trainable parameters, reducing the previous public record by 58.3%; its qubit routing algorithm improved routing efficiency by 44.4% on IBM Q20 compared to the classical SABRE algorithm; and in drug design, the candidate molecules generated by Hyra for the anti-cancer target PARP1 showed significantly higher drug-likeness scores than the marketed drug olaparib.

sentences.en: In the AI for Science field, Hyra selected 55 mathematical open problems from databases such as EinsteinArena, of which 29 set new historical records.
sentences.zh: 在AI for Science领域，Hyra从EinsteinArena等数据库中选出了55个数学开放问题，其中29个创下了新的历史记录。

sentences.en: The team also provided Hyra with monthly sunspot data from 1749 to 1932, and the recurrence formula discovered by Hyra achieved an R² of 0.77 on out-of-sample data spanning nearly a century.
sentences.zh: 该团队还向 Hyra 提供了从 1749 年到 1932 年的每月太阳黑子数据，Hyra 发现的递推公式在跨越近一个世纪的样本外数据上实现了 0.77 的 R²。

sentences.en: More breakthroughs include Hyra designing a Transformer that can perform 10-digit addition with only 15 trainable parameters, reducing the previous public record by 58.3%; its qubit routing algorithm improved routing efficiency by 44.4% on IBM Q20 compared to the classical SABRE algorithm; and in drug design, the candidate molecules generated by Hyra for the anti-cancer target PARP1 showed significantly higher drug-likeness scores than the marketed drug olaparib.
sentences.zh: 更多突破包括Hyra设计了一个Transformer，只需15个可训练参数即可执行10位加法，将之前的公开记录减少了58.3%；其量子比特路由算法在IBM Q20上比经典SABRE算法提高了44.4%的路由效率；而在药物设计中，Hyra针对抗癌靶标PARP1生成的候选分子显示出明显高于市售药物olaparib的药物相似度评分。

blocks.html_en: In the AI for Fun field, Hyra's Go-playing program ranked third among 730 participating programs on the Botzone platform; it can generate renderable 3D models based on a single 2D reference image; and it can also compose full harmonies for various instruments based on a melody, generating richly colored complete arrangements after seven rounds of evolution.

sentences.en: In the AI for Fun field, Hyra's Go-playing program ranked third among 730 participating programs on the Botzone platform; it can generate renderable 3D models based on a single 2D reference image; and it can also compose full harmonies for various instruments based on a melody, generating richly colored complete arrangements after seven rounds of evolution.
sentences.zh: 在AI for Fun领域，Hyra的围棋程序在Botzone平台730个参赛程序中排名第三；它可以基于单个 2D 参考图像生成可渲染的 3D 模型；还可以根据旋律为各种乐器谱出完整的和声，经过七轮进化，产生色彩丰富的完整编曲。

blocks.html_en: The Tencent Hunyuan team stated that these are still preliminary achievements. In the future, they will integrate Hyra into product systems, real AI R&D pipelines, and industrial scenarios, driving the evolutionary cycle of "scaffolding-data-model," enabling the next generation of Hunyuan models and Hyra to continue co-evolving.

sentences.en: The Tencent Hunyuan team stated that these are still preliminary achievements.
sentences.zh: 腾讯混元团队表示，这些还只是初步成果。

sentences.en: In the future, they will integrate Hyra into product systems, real AI R&D pipelines, and industrial scenarios, driving the evolutionary cycle of "scaffolding-data-model," enabling the next generation of Hunyuan models and Hyra to continue co-evolving.
sentences.zh: 未来，他们将把Hyra融入到产品体系、真正的AI研发管线、产业场景中，驱动“脚手架-数据-模型”的进化循环，让下一代混元模型和Hyra持续共同进化。

content_html_zh:
7月21日，腾讯混元团队正式发布Hyra-1.0（混元研究Agent），这是一款能够递归自我改进、专为性能导向的研究和工程任务而设计的智能Agent。 该系统遵循“惨痛教训”的设计理念——尽可能保持框架的轻量级，并在很大程度上扩展智能体的行动空间，利用简单通用的循环框架将智能和计算能力转化为真实的回报。

Hyra的核心架构由三部分组成：Context Agent维护经验库，不断生成“灵感”上下文来填充任务队列；多个提案代理从队列中获取上下文，在独立的沙箱中生成并运行解决方案；整个系统作为异步生产者-消费者管道运行，资源利用率随着时间的推移而有效扩展。 对于没有评估者的任务，Hyra 可以升级为两层循环，让解决方案和评估机制一起进化，有效防止奖励黑客攻击。

在 AI for AI 领域，Hyra 在三个基准测试中超越了 Recursive 中报告的最佳结果：它在 NanoChat Autoresearch 任务中将验证集 BPB 降低到了 0.9015；将深度优化的 NanoGPT Speedrun 上实现验证损失 3.28 的时间缩短至 76.4 秒；在 SOL-ExecBench 上联合优化 235 个 GPU 内核后，平均 SOL 达到 0.771。

在AI for Science领域，Hyra从EinsteinArena等数据库中选出了55个数学开放问题，其中29个创下了新的历史记录。 该团队还向 Hyra 提供了从 1749 年到 1932 年的每月太阳黑子数据，Hyra 发现的递推公式在跨越近一个世纪的样本外数据上实现了 0.77 的 R²。 更多突破包括Hyra设计了一个Transformer，只需15个可训练参数即可执行10位加法，将之前的公开记录减少了58.3%；其量子比特路由算法在IBM Q20上比经典SABRE算法提高了44.4%的路由效率；而在药物设计中，Hyra针对抗癌靶标PARP1生成的候选分子显示出明显高于市售药物olaparib的药物相似度评分。

在AI for Fun领域，Hyra的围棋程序在Botzone平台730个参赛程序中排名第三；它可以基于单个 2D 参考图像生成可渲染的 3D 模型；还可以根据旋律为各种乐器谱出完整的和声，经过七轮进化，产生色彩丰富的完整编曲。

腾讯混元团队表示，这些还只是初步成果。 未来，他们将把Hyra融入到产品体系、真正的AI研发管线、产业场景中，驱动“脚手架-数据-模型”的进化循环，让下一代混元模型和Hyra持续共同进化。
